workplan: Build Agent 8: Dispute Resolution. Handle user complaints with severity classification, refund calculation, provider action, and bilingual empathetic resolution messages.
tasks_completed: Created dispute_agent with 6 dispute categories and resolution policies
resolve_dispute() saves to Firestore disputes collection via firebase_client.create_dispute()
Updates booking status to DISPUTED with dispute_id reference
escalate_to_human boolean triggers human review queue
decisions_made: 6 dispute types with pre-defined resolution policies in agent instruction
Severity levels: LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH | CRITICAL
Refund percentage calculated by LLM based on dispute severity and evidence
Human escalation for CRITICAL severity or when LLM is uncertain
Provider warning stored alongside dispute for accountability
outcome: Dispute agent implemented with full Firestore integration. Handles POOR_QUALITY, NO_SHOW, OVERCHARGING, RUDE_BEHAVIOR, INCOMPLETE_WORK, SAFETY_CONCERN categories.
